package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/smtp"
)

// scenario for smtp_plaintext_auth: `smtp.PlainAuth` used without TLS (`smtp.SendMail` to non-TLS endpoints)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario733Positive(password string) smtp.Auth {
	return smtp.PlainAuth("", "user", password, "mail.example.com")
}
